blocks.description: Program header comments with change log, OPTIONS for macro debugging, LIBNAME definitions for five libraries (raw, staging, mart, rptout, archive), and global configuration variables for report base path, default period, as-of date, and framework return code

%MACRO validate_params: parameter validation utility that iterates over required parameter names using COUNTW/SCAN, checks each for non-blank values, and sets &framework_rc=1 with ERROR messages for missing parameters

%MACRO get_date_range: date range calculator using %SYSFUNC(INTNX) and %SYSFUNC(PUTN); supports MTH/QTR/YTD/YR periods relative to an as-of date; populates global macro vars &range_start, &range_end, &range_label

%MACRO create_format: dynamically creates a SAS format from a lookup dataset using PROC FORMAT CNTLIN=; builds CNTLIN-compatible dataset from specified start/label columns, calls %validate_params, and tracks entry count via CALL SYMPUTX
%MACRO standard_report opening: documentation header, macro declaration with 6 parameters (report_name, input_ds, class_vars, analysis_vars, output_fmt, where_clause), and local variable declarations
%validate_params invocation inside standard_report to verify required parameters; early return if validation fails

Setup and DATA _null_ step inside standard_report: counts analysis variables via COUNTW, then uses CALL SYMPUTX to capture total observation count and grand mean of the first analysis variable into global macro vars for report titles

%IF/%ELSE chain inside standard_report selecting ODS output destination (HTML/PDF/RTF) based on &output_fmt parameter with style options; sets TITLE1-TITLE3 and FOOTNOTE; includes error handling for unsupported formats

%DO loop inside standard_report iterating over each analysis variable: runs PROC MEANS for descriptive statistics (n, mean, std, min, q1, median, q3, max) with OUTPUT statement, and PROC SQL for top-10 records by variable value

PROC SQL inside standard_report creating cross-tabulation summary table rptout.&report_name._summary with dynamic column list generated by %DO loop over analysis variables, computing mean and sum for each
%IF/%ELSE chain inside standard_report closing the correct ODS destination (HTML/PDF/RTF) based on &output_fmt; resets TITLE and FOOTNOTE
%DO cleanup loop inside standard_report deleting per-variable summary tables via PROC DATASETS; %MEND standard_report
%MACRO batch_reports opening: documentation header, macro declaration with 5 parameters (region_list, period, as_of, output_fmt, include_yoy), and local variable declarations
%validate_params invocation inside batch_reports to verify region_list parameter; early return if validation fails
%get_date_range invocation inside batch_reports for period calculation, followed by region count computation using COUNTW and %PUT status message

%DO loop inside batch_reports iterating over regions: extracts region-specific data from raw.sales_data into staging via DATA step with date range filter, then calls %standard_report for each region with product_category/department class vars and revenue/units_sold/margin_pct analysis vars

%IF %UPCASE(&include_yoy)=Y conditional inside batch_reports region loop: computes prior year date range via %SYSFUNC(INTNX), builds YoY comparison dataset via PROC SQL with current-year vs prior-year revenue by product_category, including revenue_pct_change calculation
PROC DATASETS cleanup inside batch_reports region loop with conditional deletion of YoY staging data; %END closing region loop; %MEND batch_reports
DATA step creating staging.product_lookup from raw.product_master for dynamic format creation
%create_format invocation generating $PRODLBL format from product_code/product_description lookup
DATA step creating staging.dept_lookup from raw.department_master for dynamic format creation
%create_format invocation generating $DEPTLBL format from dept_code/dept_name lookup
%get_date_range invocation for QTR period with default as-of date, setting up &range_start, &range_end, and &range_label for the quarterly reporting run
%batch_reports invocation for 5 regions (Northeast, Midwest, South, West, International) with QTR period, HTML output, and year-over-year comparison enabled

PROC SQL creating mart.quarterly_summary as a summary-of-summaries across all 5 regional report outputs using UNION ALL, aggregating by product_category with total_records, total_revenue, weighted_avg_revenue, total_units, avg_margin
%standard_report invocation generating consolidated executive PDF report from mart.quarterly_summary with product_category class vars and total_revenue/total_units/avg_margin analysis vars

DATA step computing rolling quarterly trends from mart.quarterly_summary: RETAIN for q1-q4 revenue by product_category, rolling average and revenue volatility calculation using MEAN/STD functions, volatility_flag classification (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) based on coefficient of variation thresholds
PROC SQL inserting report execution metadata into mart.report_execution_log with date, period, range, regions processed, output format, and run timestamp
PROC DATASETS cleanup deleting staging lookup datasets (product_lookup, dept_lookup)
%IF &framework_rc NE 0 conditional: emits WARNING messages for framework errors; %ELSE confirms successful completion of all reports
Reset OPTIONS to nomprint/nomlogic/nosymbolgen and final %PUT completion message with timestamp
